artifact.name: Abyssal Prism
artifact.origin: Recovered from a drowned temple beneath a moonless tidal rift.
artifact.power: Bends shadows into solid pathways and mirror phantoms.
artifact.consequence: Reality fractures briefly, revealing parallel echoes of the wielder.

title: Abyssal Prism Unsealed: Vault Episode 2 Ignites the Fireverse
thumbnail_concept: Close-up of Abyssal Prism (fractured black crystal) floating above a glowing altar, with The Fifth Lumen emerging from shadowed runes, cinematic contrast, bold text: 'UNSEALED'.
director_style: Hybrid tone: slow mythic buildup to explosive activation.
episode_card:
Episode #2: Abyssal Prism Unsealed: Vault Episode 2 Ignites the Fireverse
Artifact: Abyssal Prism
Vault: Fireverse Artifact Vault
Spirit Presence: The Fifth Lumen
Hook: A sealed relic calls to the chosen hand—and the vault listens.
Cliffhanger: A hidden chamber unlocks after the Abyssal Prism activation signature is recorded.

spirit_entity.name: The Fifth Lumen
spirit_entity.nature: Radiant intelligence made of geometric light strata.
spirit_entity.role: Projects cryptic future fragments when an artifact reaches peak output.

narration_lines: In the silent deep of the vault, the Abyssal Prism is found where prayers turned to stone.
Obsidian columns breathe with memory: The vault records every activation as living memory in its obsidian columns.
A pulse answers the chamber as Bends shadows into solid pathways and mirror phantoms. stirs beneath etched sigils.
The air tightens; The Fifth Lumen appears, testing intent before release.
Then ignition—Reality fractures briefly, revealing parallel echoes of the wielder. as the chamber erupts in controlled cosmic fire.
When the light fades, a final echo remains: Final echoes after activation are often clues to a larger vault conspiracy.
